series_metadata.series_description: The BWC conducts audits of self insuring employers to ascertain compliance with Chapters 4121 and 4123 of the Ohio Revised and Administrative Codes along with BWC policies and procedures. The Compliance and Paid Compensation Audits contain reports, related working papers, supporting documents and orientations included. The Compliance and Paid Compensation Audits are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan original document into UDS, verify scanned image is readable, and ; Electronic: in UDS , and
